issues.message: ASCII double-quotes around "派遣劳动者" in ZH definition; ZH convention uses 「」 or 《》. Inconsistent with JP corner-bracket usage in same text.
"系统使用者" is slightly ambiguous (could mean end-user vs. orderer). JP source clarifies with "発注者". Consider "发包方（系统的委托方）" for precision, but current reading is acceptable.
"派遣目的地（用工单位）" for 派遣先: primary term "派遣目的地" is literal/awkward MT. Standard ZH labor law term is "用工单位" alone, or "派遣接受单位". The parenthetical rescues it but the primary label is non-standard.
"法律以外の業務" is an exam-level simplification of the Civil Code distinction. Technically it should be "法律行為以外の事務" (non-juridical acts). Acceptable for IT Passport scope but worth noting.
Minor wording variation between term entity ("委托执行法律业务以外工作") and table row ("委托法律以外业务"). Semantically equivalent but could confuse learners cross-referencing. Consider harmonizing.
Trailing period in EN definition ("...during which work is mandatory."). Many other EN definitions in this chunk lack trailing period. Minor style inconsistency.
Trailing period in EN definition ("...regardless of actual hours worked."). Minor style inconsistency.
Trailing period in EN definition ("...A contract to entrust legal work."). Minor style inconsistency.
ASCII straight double-quotes (U+0022) used around quoted terms "遵守法令" and "不仅遵守法令…企业伦理". ZH convention uses curly quotes “” or 「」. This is a consistent MT artifact.
ASCII straight double-quote in ZH table cell: '劳动者由派遣方雇佣、由派遣目的地接受指示的合同。在该合同中,派遣目的地（出钱的公司）与派遣方（收钱的公司）之间签订劳动者派遣合同书,缔结劳动者派遣契约。另外,受'
